Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments_aggregate', (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_build_object('budget', SUM("budget")), 'avg', json_build_object('budget', AVG("budget")), 'max', json_build_object('budget', MAX("budget")), 'min', json_build_object('budget', MIN("budget")), 'stddev', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV("budget")), 'stddev_pop', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV_POP("budget")), 'stddev_samp', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV_SAMP("budget")), 'variance', json_build_object('budget', VARIANCE("budget")), 'var_pop', json_build_object('budget', VAR_POP("budget")), 'var_samp', json_build_object('budget', VAR_SAMP("budget"))) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
